product_page.spec_line: 140 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible, Woven Like Knit Fabric
description_blocks: %100 polyester, 140 g/m² woven like warp knit fabric developed for Jackets and Raincoats
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.

technical_documents.context_text: Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Polyester (PES) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 68 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 140 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1200 kPa (kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 6.2 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
140 g/m² , 100% Polyester, High Visible, Woven Like Knit Fabric

%100 polyester, 140 g/m² woven like warp knit fabric developed for Jackets and Raincoats. EN ISO 20471 certified. Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light. As a result they shine more than other objects. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Raincoat, Jacket, Parka Quality Management Done ISO 9001 High Visibility Done EN ISO 20471 Technical Documents >> ArBir Data Sheet Certificates
